title: Offline-Invsee
description: A simple Plugin that allows you to see the Inventory from offline players and you can manage them.
body:
With the Offline-Invsee Plugin you can manage Inventories and amors from player which are offline 

### **Commands you can use with the Plugin:**

/offlineinvsee <player>
/offlinearmor <player>

Have fun with the Plugin! c:
